title: buries
content:
For his first official release, Che Ecru brings everyone an infectious, love-woven project that outlines the push and pull of finding love through pain with his mixtape "buries". The lyrics are as smooth as they are unapologetic, and are paired with beats that perfectly match the versatility of his flow.

His independence as an artist goes beyond just writing—he’s been producing, singing, rapping, mixing, and engineering majority of his music over the past six years, outside of a few production collaborations.

Combining the smoothness of R&B and the rawness of hip-hop, buries somehow feels as though it narrates the love-lives of a generation. Che has the ability to say a lot with a little, all while drawing you in with his voice.
